SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-03-17: Iran targets UAE energy infrastructure as gas field set ablaze, tanker struck near Strait of Hormuz: Oil prices advanced on Tuesday as energy market participants monitored Middle East supply disruptions.. 2026-03-17: Tesla to buy $4.3 billion of LG Energy battery cells from disbanded GM plant: Tesla is expanding ties with LG Energy Solution to include a $4.3 billion deal for U.S.-produced cells for energy storage systems from Michigan.. 2026-03-17: Arizona charges Kalshi with criminal misdemeanors, alleging it's an illegal gambling operation: The Arizona charges are the first criminal charges to have been filed against Kalshi, though the company is embroiled in multiple lawsuits over its predictions platform.. 2026-03-17: The Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday. Here's what to expect: The Federal Reserve has little choice but to stay on the sidelines this week.. 2026-03-17: Orlando Bravo pushes back on private markets criticism: 'Everybody's extremely comfortable': Bravo said deep sector expertise is separating winners from losers as artificial intelligence creates disruption across the software industry.. 2026-03-17: These high-yielding energy plays could be a ‘win/win,’ regardless of what happens with oil, Bank of America says: Master limited partnerships can offer solid income and hold up even as oil prices swing.. 2026-03-17: Elon Musk and SEC in talks to settle lawsuit over Twitter deal: The SEC accused Elon Musk of failing to promptly disclose that he amassed an active stake in Twitter in 2022. . 2026-03-17: Epstein files: House panel subpoenas AG Pam Bondi for April 14 deposition: The House panel wants to question Bondi about the DOJ's compliance with the Epstein Files Transparency Act, which President Donald Trump signed into law.. 2026-03-17: Nissan joins Toyota, Honda in plans to export U.S. cars to Japan: Nissan will export the Murano SUV built in Smyrna, Tennessee, beginning early next year. It marks the first American-made Nissan sold in Japan since the 1990s.. 2026-03-17: Orlando Bravo says some software names hit by AI deserve a valuation cut: The Thoma Bravo co-founder said that some of the software stocks getting hit by the AI wave deserve a lower valuation.. 2026-03-17: U.S. counterterrorism director Joe Kent resigns over war: 'Iran posed no imminent threat': \Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation,\" Kent wrote in his letter to President Donald Trump.". 2026-03-17: Everything to know about the SAVE America Act voter ID-bill: President Donald Trump has been pushing Congress to approve the SAVE America Act to require ID at the polls and proof of U.S. citizenship to register to vote.. 2026-03-17: Gecko Robotics brings its AI to U.S. Navy ship repair in latest next-gen defense tech deal: CEO Jake Loosararian said Gecko is supporting the Navy's push to have 80% fleet readiness by 2027.. 2026-03-17: Airlines raise revenue guidance despite rising fuel costs, citing growth in demand: CEO Ed Bastian told CNBC's Phil LeBeau that Delta had taken a $400 million fuel hit in the quarter, but that demand has been \really, really great.\" ". 2026-03-17: Microsoft shakes up Copilot AI leadership team, freeing up Suleyman to build new models: Microsoft is doubling down on its superintelligence group to build models, while consolidating engineering efforts for break out of a tight range. . 2026-03-17: Trump slams NATO allies for not joining Iran war effort, says U.S. never needed their help: Trump, a longtime NATO critic, said he sees the alliance as a \one way street — We will protect them, but they will do nothing for us.\"". 2026-03-17: Senate Democrats send DHS counteroffer to Trump as shutdown drags on: The Department of Homeland Security shutdown has caused pileups in airport security lines across the country.. 2026-03-17: Iran war, oil price surge worsen K-shaped economy, say economists: Rising oil prices and the fallout of the U.S.-Iran war are worsening the economic divide, experts say. . 2026-03-17: 2026 Just Capital rankings: See the companies on the annual list of corporate leaders: The annual Just Capital rankings identify companies 'Good Morning America' comments follow a recent executive shake-up and renewed questions about the company's strategy for AI.. 2026-03-17: Mastercard says it's acquiring stablecoin startup BVNK in
